briefdescription.para: Check if a value is odd.

Max supported types, used for creating lookup table for parameters for types supported number should be max valid + 1 (as first slot will be for invalid parameters) XSecure_LmsType from 0 (unsupported) to XSECURE_LMS_SHAKE_M32_H20.
Length of fixed part of public key.
Length of T field of public key.
Length of Merkle tree node number.
Offset of LmsType field in public key.
Offset of OtsType field in public key.
Offset of I field in public key.
Offset of T field in public key.
Offset of Q field in LMS Signature.
Offset of OTS field in LMS Signature.
Different Heights supported for Merkle Tree, 'h'=25 not supported.
LMS Public key structure to access root value.
Used to store data which is repeatedly sent to SHA engine, during LMS root value calculation.
This function returns the parameters for the type of LMS type.

parameterdescription.para: XSecure_LmsType, type of OTS algorithm selected
Pointer to array location where all predefined parameter values are present XSecure_LmsParam

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - Valid type is passed, and parameters are assigned
XST_FAILURE - If not a valid type is passed
Return the parameter for below LMS types
'h'=25 variations and 24 bit hash outputs are not supported till date in this library
default, and other not supported options
Two possible glitches, replacing this condition with a NOP, we will update error and exit flipping condition, we update error and exit, so both cases it is OK.
Update register to be taken care by caller
No matter success or failure, call happened successfully

briefdescription.para: This file contains structures, constants and defines used in LMS and HSS provides interface to LMS operations.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ---------------------------------------------------------- 5.4 kal 07/24/24 Initial release 5.7 tvp 11/20/25 Code refactoring for platform specific LMS functionality
